title: I use the premium Dreame Aqua10 Ultra robovac in my own home, but this alternative at 44% off is a smarter buy
excerpt: With relatively minor differences, the Dreame Aqua10 Roller for AU$1,387 is excellent value
content_html:
I've been testing and writing about robot vacuums for nearly a decade here on TechRadar Australia and one of the standouts for me in the past 12 months was (if you'll excuse the pun) an absolute dream machine.

If you read my in-depth Dreame Aqua10 Ultra review, you'll know just how impressed I was with its overall performance, and my nitpicking complaints were mostly to do with how its battery gets used, which honestly isn't even a complaint — perhaps more of an observation.

It is, however, a premium model that I've only very rarely seen discounted. Its slightly cheaper sibling, the standard Dreame Aqua10 Roller, though, is almost as good and also currently 44% off on Amazon, and just AU$69.35 more than its Prime Day price from earlier this July.

That's still a sight better than having to pay nearly three grand for the Ultra version.

The differences between Aqua10 Roller and its Ultra sibling may seem like a long list, but trust someone who's still using the latter in her own home — it's overkill and not worth the extra cash.

So what are those differences? Well, for starters, the LiDAR turret doesn't lower itself automatically on the standard Roller version, but that's not unique to it, especially at this price. It also misses out on the 3D mapping that the Ultra version does but, again, a 2D map is pretty much all most people will need (floors, after all, tend to be pretty flat). And it gets a single-compartment soap dispenser instead of the dual-slot one in the Ultra which, again, isn't necessary unless you want to use an odour-neutralising solution as well.

For your money, you're still getting a whopping 30,000Pa of suction which, going by how well my Ultra version utilises it, will do very well on carpets and I am in awe at how well the roller mop works on the Dreame. There are plenty of intelligent features available on the Aqua10, including intelligent stain removal, so if you think your robovac has forgotten its navigation path and is circling, that's likely just its sensors picking up extra dirt in a small area and getting the bot to clean repeatedly for a thorough job.

It's also a machine that promises excellent edge cleaning, since it uses the exact same side brush and extending roller mop as the Ultra model. And the Roller even has the same automatic mop cover, which comes on as soon as it detects carpet to keep the mop head clean and your carpet dry.

While the Roller doesn't quite match the Ultra's ability to move over thresholds and steps up to 8cm tall, it's capacity to tackle heights up to 6cm is still above average, and means it can potentially head into patio areas if your sliding door frames aren't very high.

If it performs anywhere as well as my Ultra model, I think the Dreame Aqua10 Roller will be hard to beat at its current discounted price.

sentences.zh: Aqua10 上有很多智能功能，包括智能去污，因此，如果您认为您的扫地机器人忘记了其导航路径并且正在盘旋，那很可能只是它的传感器在小区域内拾取了多余的污垢，并让机器人反复清洁以完成彻底的工作。

blocks.html_en: It's also a machine that promises excellent edge cleaning, since it uses the exact same side brush and extending roller mop as the Ultra model. sentences.en: And the Roller even has the same automatic mop cover, which comes on as soon as it detects carpet to keep the mop head clean and your carpet dry.
sentences.zh: Roller 甚至还具有相同的自动拖把盖，一旦检测到地毯，它就会立即启动，以保持拖把头清洁和地毯干燥。

blocks.html_en: While the Roller doesn't quite match the Ultra's ability to move over thresholds and steps up to 8cm tall, it's capacity to tackle heights up to 6cm is still above average, and means it can potentially head into patio areas if your sliding door frames aren't very high.

sentences.en: While the Roller doesn't quite match the Ultra's ability to move over thresholds and steps up to 8cm tall, it's capacity to tackle heights up to 6cm is still above average, and means it can potentially head into patio areas if your sliding door frames aren't very high.
sentences.zh: 虽然 Roller 与 Ultra 跨越门槛和高达 8 厘米的台阶的能力不太匹配，但它处理高达 6 厘米高度的能力仍然高于平均水平，这意味着如果您的滑动门框不是很高，它可能会进入露台区域。

blocks.html_en: If it performs anywhere as well as my Ultra model, I think the Dreame Aqua10 Roller will be hard to beat at its current discounted price.

sentences.zh: 如果它在任何地方的表现都和我的 Ultra 型号一样好，我认为 Dreame Aqua10 Roller 以目前的折扣价格将很难被击败。

content_html_zh:
近十年来，我一直在澳大利亚 TechRadar 上测试和撰写有关机器人真空吸尘器的文章，过去 12 个月对我来说最突出的产品之一是（请原谅我用双关语）一台绝对梦想的机器。

如果你读过我对 Dreame Aqua10 Ultra 的深入评测，你就会知道它的整体性能给我留下了多么深刻的印象，而我的挑剔抱怨主要与它的电池使用方式有关，老实说，这甚至不是抱怨——也许更多的是观察。

然而，这是一款我很少看到打折的高端型号。 不过，其价格稍便宜的同级产品标准 Dreame Aqua10 滚轮几乎同样好，目前在亚马逊上也有 44% 的折扣，仅比今年 7 月初的 Prime Day 价格高出 69.35 澳元。

这仍然比花费近三块钱购买 Ultra 版本要好。

Aqua10 Roller 和它的 Ultra 兄弟产品之间的差异可能看起来很长，但相信那些仍在自己家里使用后者的人——它太过分了，不值得花额外的钱。

那么这些差异是什么？ 好吧，对于初学者来说，激光雷达炮塔在标准滚轮版本上不会自动降低，但这并不是它独有的，尤其是在这个价格下。 它还错过了 Ultra 版本所做的 3D 地图，但同样，2D 地图几乎是大多数人所需要的（毕竟，地板往往非常平坦）。 它配备了一个单室皂液器，而不是 Ultra 中的双槽皂液器，除非您也想使用气味中和解决方案，否则这不是必需的。

为了你的钱，你仍然可以获得高达 30,000Pa 的吸力，根据我的 Ultra 版本的吸力，它在地毯上的表现非常好，我对滚筒拖把在 Dreame 上的表现感到惊叹。 Aqua10 上有很多智能功能，包括智能去污，因此，如果您认为您的扫地机器人忘记了其导航路径并且正在盘旋，那很可能只是它的传感器在小区域内拾取了多余的污垢，并让机器人反复清洁以完成彻底的工作。

它也是一款能够实现出色边缘清洁的机器，因为它使用与 Ultra 型号完全相同的边刷和延伸滚筒拖把。 Roller 甚至还具有相同的自动拖把盖，一旦检测到地毯，它就会立即启动，以保持拖把头清洁和地毯干燥。

虽然 Roller 与 Ultra 跨越门槛和高达 8 厘米的台阶的能力不太匹配，但它处理高达 6 厘米高度的能力仍然高于平均水平，这意味着如果您的滑动门框不是很高，它可能会进入露台区域。

如果它在任何地方的表现都和我的 Ultra 型号一样好，我认为 Dreame Aqua10 Roller 以目前的折扣价格将很难被击败。
